architecture/compliance.title: Compliance Features
architecture/compliance.description: How SSS maps to reserve attestation, sanctions controls, role separation, and issuer operations commonly discussed in U.S. stablecoin proposals.

architecture/instructions.title: Instructions
architecture/instructions.description: All on-chain instructions, accounts, arguments, and role requirements for sss-token and sss-transfer-hook.

architecture/overview.title: Architecture Overview
architecture/overview.description: Account structure, PDA layout, program roles, and Token-2022 extension usage for the Solana Stablecoin Standard.

guides/attestations.title: Reserve Attestations
guides/attestations.description: Building reserve data, hashing reports, and writing on-chain reserve attestations with the SSS SDK.

guides/blacklist.title: Blacklisting And Seizure
guides/blacklist.description: How to blacklist wallets, freeze accounts, seize funds, and remove blacklist entries with SSS.

guides/mint-burn.title: Mint And Burn
guides/mint-burn.description: How to register minters, mint tokens, and burn tokens with the SSS SDK.

guides/roles.title: Roles And Authority
guides/roles.description: Role-based access control, role updates, and authority rotation for SSS issuers.

guides/transfer-hook.title: Transfer Hook
guides/transfer-hook.description: How SSS-2 transfer-hook enforcement works and why the ExtraAccountMetaList is required.

installation.title: Installation
installation.description: Package installation, dependency alignment, and environment expectations for the SSS SDK.

intro.title: What Is SSS?
intro.description: Solana Stablecoin Standard is a Token-2022 framework for issuing stablecoins with role-based controls, reserve attestations, and optional transfer-hook enforcement.

llm/agent-guide.title: Agent Guide
llm/agent-guide.description: Compact, copy-paste-first reference for LLM agents integrating the Solana Stablecoin Standard SDK.

quickstart.title: Quickstart
quickstart.description: Install the SDK, connect to Solana devnet, and initialize an SSS stablecoin with the real API.

sdk/client.title: SDK Client
sdk/client.description: Source-verified reference for SSSClient, including constructor options, methods, params, return types, and practical caveats.

sdk/constants.title: Constants
sdk/constants.description: Program IDs, token program IDs, and PDA seed constants exported by the SDK.

sdk/errors.title: Errors
sdk/errors.description: Error tables and handling patterns for SSS token-program and transfer-hook failures.

sdk/events.title: Events
sdk/events.description: On-chain event types and log parsing helpers exported by the SSS SDK.

sdk/oracle.title: Oracle And Attestations
sdk/oracle.description: OracleModule reference for price feeds, reserve hashing, amount conversion, and CPI helper data.

sdk/pda.title: PDA Helpers
sdk/pda.description: PDA derivation helpers, seeds, and examples for SSS config, roles, minters, blacklist entries, attestations, and hook metadata.

sdk/presets.title: Presets
sdk/presets.description: Preset configurations for SSS-1, SSS-2, SSS-3, and custom feature flags.

sdk/types.title: SDK Types
sdk/types.description: Enums, account interfaces, and instruction parameter shapes exported by the SSS SDK.
